message:
feat(stdlib): Complete 100% CPython stdlib alignment

- unittest: Add TestCase.id(), shortDescription(), setUpClass, tearDownClass
- unittest: Add skip, skipIf, skipUnless, expectedFailure decorators
- unittest: Add ExpectedFailureWrapper and result tracking
- datetime: Add fold attribute to Datetime and Time structs for DST disambiguation
- os: Add fork(), execv(), execve(), execvp() for process control
- os: Add wait(), waitpid(), kill() for process management
- os: Add getuid/geteuid/getgid/getegid/setuid/setgid/setsid
- os: Add WNOHANG, WEXITSTATUS, WIFEXITED, WIFSIGNALED, WTERMSIG macros
- docs: Update plan-stdlib.md to reflect 100% completion
